heading: Forest products for traditional and cultural purposes
label: 3055 Forest products for traditional and cultural purposes
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Effective DateSection and repeal of by effective , the date of enactment of , see , set out as a note under , Agriculture.Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246section 8701 of Title 7May 22, 2008
Definition of “Secretary”“Secretary” as meaning the Secretary of Agriculture, see , Agriculture.section 8701 of Title 7

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Secretary may provide free of charge to Indian tribes any trees, portions of trees, or forest products from National Forest System land for traditional and cultural purposes.section 472a of title 16

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: b Prohibition
children.text: Trees, portions of trees, or forest products provided under subsection (a) may not be used for commercial purposes.
